---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an SDK, demo, docs, or tooling improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or host need is not covered today?

## Proposed direction

Describe the desired behavior, API, workflow, or demo experience.

## Traceability

- Related GitHub issue or PR:
- Related Beads issue:

## Why this belongs in AsterGraph

Explain why this should live in the SDK, docs, demo, or tooling instead of only in a custom host.

## Dependencies / Parallelism

What must land first, and which parts can be implemented independently?

## Constraints

Any compatibility, packaging, UI, or runtime constraints that matter.

## UI / Screenshots

- [ ] no UI change expected
- [ ] UI change expected; screenshot or visual proof required
- [ ] unsure

## Proof or validation

Which command, proof marker, screenshot route, or acceptance check should prove completion?

## Non-goals

What should this request explicitly avoid changing or claiming?
